repos.name: iptv-org/iptv
repos.descriptionZhtw: 收錄來自世界各地公開可用的 IPTV 頻道

repos.name: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
repos.descriptionZhtw: 讓 AI Agent 能瀏覽整個網路，透過單一 CLI 讀取和搜尋 Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、GitHub、Bilibili、小紅書，且無需 API 費用
repos.descriptionEn: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

repos.name: meshery/meshery
repos.descriptionZhtw: Meshery，雲原生基礎設施管理平台
repos.descriptionEn: Meshery, the cloud native manager

repos.name: krahets/hello-algo
repos.descriptionZhtw: 《Hello 算法》：動畫圖解、一鍵執行的資料結構與演算法教程，支援繁中、簡中、英文、日文及多種程式語言實作
repos.descriptionEn: 《Hello 算法》：动画图解、一键运行的数据结构与算法教程。支持简中、繁中、English、日本語，提供 Python, Java, C++, C, C#, JS, Go, Swift, Rust, Ruby, Kotlin, TS, Dart 等代码实现

repos.name: jwasham/coding-interview-university

repos.descriptionEn: Self-Hosting Guide. Learn all about locally hosting (on premises & private web servers) and managing software applications by yourself or your organization. Including Cloud, LLMs, WireGuard, Automation, Home Assistant, and Networking.

repos.name: Universal-Debloater-Alliance/universal-android-debloater-next-generation
repos.descriptionZhtw: 以 Rust 撰寫的跨平台 GUI 工具，透過 ADB 清除非 Root Android 裝置的預裝軟體，提升隱私、安全性與電池續航
repos.descriptionEn: Cross-platform GUI written in Rust using ADB to debloat non-rooted Android devices. Improve your privacy, the security and battery life of your device.

repos.name: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
repos.descriptionZhtw: 高效能程式碼智慧 MCP 伺服器，可將程式庫索引為持久知識圖譜，毫秒內完成，支援 158 種語言，查詢延遲低於 1ms，Token 用量減少 99%，單一靜態執行檔，零依賴
repos.descriptionEn: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.

repos.descriptionZhtw: TimesFM（時間序列基礎模型）：由 Google Research 開發的預訓練時間序列基礎模型，專為時間序列預測設計
repos.descriptionEn: TimesFM (Time Series Foundation Model) is a pretrained time-series foundation model developed by Google Research for time-series forecasting.

repos.descriptionZhtw: 全球首個開源 AI 代理影片製作系統，內建 12 條流程、52 個工具、500+ Agent Skills，可將 AI 程式碼助手變身完整影片製作工作室

repos.name: makeplane/plane
repos.descriptionZhtw: 🔥 開源的 Jira、Linear、Monday、ClickUp 替代方案，現代化專案管理平台，支援任務、Sprint、文件與問題分類管理
repos.descriptionEn: 🔥🔥🔥 Open-source Jira, Linear, Monday, and ClickUp alternative. Plane is a modern project management platform to manage tasks, sprints, docs, and triage.
